global.description: The ad features a bright yellow background with food item images and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting food delivery with a special offer.

elements.label: yellow background
elements.description: A solid yellow background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.description: Three rectangular images of food items arranged horizontally in the center.

elements.label: cravings text
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Your cravings, delivered' in a large font at the bottom.

elements.label: price text
elements.description: Text displaying the price '€19.90' in a prominent position below the cravings text.

elements.label: order button
elements.description: A bold button with the text 'Order now' prominently displayed at the bottom.

elements.label: CraveLoop logo
